feed.title: AO3 - Damian Wayne/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Damian Wayne/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Irreversibility of Endless Summer
entry.summary:
Author: Linalima

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 374,192Chapters: 23/50Kudos: 155

Summary: They spoke for the first time during a literature lesson in the following academic year. The young Wayne approached her desk and, in an even voice utterly devoid of intonation, declared: “You’ve taken my seat.” Lane raised her gaze dispassionately and, in the same tone, replied: “Then find another.” An expression of genuine astonishment flickered across his face — so comical that, had she possessed a little more strength for bickering, she would certainly have laughed. Instead, the girl conciliatorily pulled her bag from the adjacent chair — as if to say, sit down, if you’re so desperate. Or The story of Lane Winters and Damian Wayne over the course of many years.

entry.title: I've Been The Archer, I've Been The Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Totallynotashieldagent

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,862Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 1,198

Summary: Reader's father and Bruce arranged for her and Damian to marry. However, before Reader's father could truly sit and explain to her his decision he passed away. And Damian never thought to question his father's decision at all.Reader's mother only saw dollar signs for this arrangement and forced it to happen much quicker than ever anticipated. Now it's just two strangers that have been forced together and trying to navigate the expectations of becoming the new IT couple of Gotham while trying to keep their secrets under wraps as Reader learns what it means to be the new Wayne Matriarch since the death of Martha Wayne.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: American Wedding
entry.summary:
Author: unbeknownsttoyouu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,443Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 21

Summary: synopsis: you and damian first met as children, being introduced to each other as future spouses. bad first impressions and animosity follow the both of you when you reunite as adults, only days before your wedding. despite yourself, you begin to warm up to damian which does nothing to his icy exterior, but melts the heart it so desperately tries to protect.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Hope
entry.summary:
Author: coldghost89

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,496Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 91

Summary: Moving around place to place is all you've ever known. Never staying in one place too long, you live a decent life with your older sister.After moving to Gotham in hopes for a new beginning, your past begins to unravel, exposing ugly truths and painful memories.But with you as you walk through this new life, is hope. Hope for the end of the bad and the beginning of the good.

entry.title: people who care
entry.summary:
Author: justiceiscalling

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,667Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

Summary: “Two flat tires.”“Yes, that would be what I just said.” You thin your lips, re-entering your car for a bit of warmth.“How does one manage—““Have you seen me drive?”Damian releases a breath, presumably from his nose, and resumes speaking. “Yes, clearly I’ve forgotten who I’m speaking to. You are the single worst driver I know. And I know Thomas.”You roll your eyes slightly. “Dukes not a bad driver.”“In comparison to you?” Damian scoffs. “Of course not.”“Shut up.”orYou and Damian Wayne care about each other. Somehow, this means he has to change your tire in the middle of the night.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Three Months to Surrender
entry.summary:
Author: Miss_nightshade

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,202Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 215

Summary: Summoned home by the League’s command, Damian is thrust into an arranged marriage that threatens everything he’s built far from their shadows. Caught between loyalty, love, and a destiny he never wanted, Damian finds himself walking a knife’s edge, where every secret costs more than the last.

entry.title: People Aren't Good
entry.summary:
Author: Miss_nightshade

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,669Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 150

Summary: Hecate has spent her life tucked into the bruised edges of Gotham’s Narrows, pretending to be a small, harmless girl with nothing worth noticing. It’s a fragile lie, but it holds. She goes to school. She walks home alone. She returns to a house that feels older than she is, a place that hums with magic she refuses to touch. She keeps her power buried. She ignores the ancient voices whispering inside her. She does everything she can to stay unseen. And for years, it works. Until the night it doesn’t.

entry.title: Beware the Nightmares on the Land and Sea
entry.summary:
Author: HotaruKurosawa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 206,435Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 296

Summary: One day, your life took a turn. For better or worse, you haven't decided yet. What you do know is that there are things on this planet that you never even knew existed. Things that your mind could never even imagine. Yet, here you are. Now, you must rebuild your life whilst trying to navigate this new one involving heroes and villains alike. Not to mention navigating the normal world and the magic one, as you possess a power that others could only dream of having. Whilst you are uncertain of how to navigate these changes in your life, these few things are certain. Don't go into the water past your knees.If you saw something that seemed abnormal, no you didn't.If you hear voices in your head, it will pass. Don't fully trust their advice.No matter what you do with your life, remember, it's not just yours that hangs in the balance.And lastly, whatever you do, don't have sex. These are the things you have to follow by to get through this life. If you don't, it won't be just you who deals with the consequences. Oh, and don't forget. The Eldritch Being inside of your chest is watching everything you do. Try not to disappoint her. Your Choices Matter.

entry.title: Distractions
entry.summary:
Author: h0ttiewithab0dy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,452Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 138

Summary: Damian Wayne does not have any friends. They’re a waste of time and a distraction from his work as Robin. But when Alfred insists that having a friend could be potentially beneficial, he caves. And the girl he chooses to tolerate ends up breaking through all his walls and into his heart.

entry.title: Last Bullet, Last Breath
entry.summary:
Author: Kmslli

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,709Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Gotham is dangerous, corrupt, and survival here is a brutal challenge. No one knows this better than those from Gotham's forgotten corners. To survive, you either have to be filthy rich or a master of the art of survival. But there is a place even more dangerous than Gotham, a place where living is nearly impossible: Zaun. A place where Gotham citizens would never dare to set foot.

entry.title: Attempted First Degree Murder
entry.summary:
Author: idk_butimhere

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,298Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 78

Summary: “Aw- don’t give me that look! It was your fault!” “No it wasn’t- I’m not that ignorant to my surroundings that I’d willingly consume paint water- it contains chemicals in it that might affect my digestive tract!-” “Don’t lie- it happens to everyone.” “It was not my fault-” He pointed an accusing finger at you, perfectly replicating that Ace Attorney game he was obsessed with. “You were distracting me.” A slow grin spread across your face. “I was distracting you, hm?”   OR Damian struggles with an art assignment and you bully him <3

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
